recipe.title: Baby potatoes with tomatoes-corn Sauté

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 cup fresh corn kernels (about 2 ears)
1 ounce fresh Parmesan cheese, shaved (about 1/4 cup)

ingredient_lines.note: in a medium saucepan, Cook 10 minutes or until tender
ingredient_lines.preparation: cover with water. Bring to a boil.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Place potatoes in a medium saucepan; cover with water. Bring to a boil. Cook 10 minutes or until tender; drain.

ingredient_lines.note: Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat., to pan; swirl to coat. Add corn and next 3 ingredients (through pepper) to pan; sauté 2 minutes. Add potatoes and tomatoes to pan; cook 1 minute. Top with cilantro and cheese.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil to pan; swirl to coat. Add corn and next 3 ingredients (through pepper) to pan; sauté 2 minutes. Add potatoes and tomatoes to pan; cook 1 minute. Top with cilantro and cheese.

ingredient_lines.note: Place, Cook 11 minutes, Pulse, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 3/8 teaspoon salt, in a medium bowl, Serves 4 serving size, Fat, (sat 8 g); Sodium 279mg
ingredient_lines.preparation: cover with water. Bring to a boil., grated, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a mini food processor.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Variation 1 Arugula Pesto: Place 1 pound baby potatoes in a saucepan; cover with water. Bring to a boil. Cook 11 minutes; drain. Pulse 1 cup arugula, 1/2 cup basil, 2 tablespoons grated Parmesan, 2 tablespoons unsalted chicken stock, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 3/8 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a mini food processor. Combine potatoes and arugula mixture in a medium bowl; toss. Serves 4 (serving size: 3/4 cup) Calories 160; Fat 6g (sat 8g); Sodium 279mg

ingredient_lines.note: Place, Cook 8 minutes, Cook 2 center-cut bacon slices in a skillet until crisp, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon Dijon, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Add potatoes and 2 cups spinach. Top with 1/4 cup green onions and bacon. Serves 4 serving size, Fat, (sat 1 g); Sodium 304mg
ingredient_lines.preparation: quartered, cover with water. Bring to a boil., crumble.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Variation 2 Warm Bacon Vinaigrette: Place 1 pound quartered baby potatoes in a saucepan; cover with water. Bring to a boil. Cook 8 minutes; drain. Cook 2 center-cut bacon slices in a skillet until crisp; crumble. Combine drippings, 2 tablespoons cider vinegar, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon Dijon, 1 teaspoon brown sugar, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Add potatoes and 2 cups spinach. Top with 1/4 cup green onions and bacon. Serves 4 (serving size: 3/4 cup) Calories 134; Fat 6g (sat 1g); Sodium 304mg

ingredient_lines.note: Cook 8 minutes; drain. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add, cook 3 minutes. Add, and 1 tablespoon water. Cover and cook 3 minutes. Add, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper; toss.
ingredient_lines.preparation: sliced, cover with water. Bring to a boil., sliced, chopped
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Variation 3 Kale and Garlic Place 1 pound sliced baby potatoes in a saucepan; cover with water. Bring to a boil. Cook 8 minutes; drain. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons canola oil. Add potatoes and 2 tablespoons sliced garlic; cook 3 minutes. Add 3 cups chopped kale and 1 tablespoon water. Cover and cook 3 minutes. Add 1 teaspoon sesame oil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper; toss.
